biography: Joni, a celebrated name from Hill Side Golf Club, is known for his strategic mind and unwavering focus on the course. Though seemingly reserved, Joni possesses a fierce competitive spirit that has made him a formidable opponent in the Hector Trophée.

Joni has graced the fairways of the Hector Trophée on one occasion, marking his presence with a memorable victory. Although he has never won the Victor Trophy, his contribution to his pair's success has been invaluable.

Currently considered retired from Hector events, Joni's legacy continues to inspire. While he is not scheduled to participate in the upcoming Hector Trophée 2026, the possibility of a return remains open, much to the anticipation of fans and fellow competitors alike.
